name: run_analysis
description: Open the Analysis Tool for a layer and run an interactive chart analysis (time-series, histogram, or scatter plot) over a time range and region.

layer_name.description: Display name of the layer to analyze.

mode.description: Spatial sampling mode: 'point' for a single coordinate, 'bbox' for a bounding box region (default: 'bbox').

start_date.description: Analysis start date in ISO format (e.g. '2024-01-01').

end_date.description: Analysis end date in ISO format (e.g. '2024-12-31').

region.description: Named geographic region or 'current view' for the analysis extent.
